{"problem_standardized_math":"Given\n\\[\nL_1=\n\\begin{bmatrix}\n1\\\\\n&1\\\\\n&&1\\\\\n&&&1\\\\\n0&l_{52}&l_{53}&l_{54}&1\n\\end{bmatrix},\n\\qquad\nU_1=\n\\begin{bmatrix}\n\\nu_{11}&u_{13}&u_{14}&u_{15}&w_1\\\\\n&u_{33}&u_{34}&u_{35}&w_3\\\\\n&&u_{44}&u_{45}&w_4\\\\\n&&&u_{55}&w_5\\\\\n&&&&\\hat{w}_2\n\\end{bmatrix},\n\\tag{13.30}\n\\]\nand\n\\[\nP_1L^{-1}B^+P_1^T=\n\\begin{bmatrix}\n\\nu_{11}&u_{13}&u_{14}&u_{15}&w_1\\\\\n&u_{33}&u_{34}&u_{35}&w_3\\\\\n&&u_{44}&u_{45}&w_4\\\\\n&&&u_{55}&w_5\\\\\n&u_{23}&u_{24}&u_{25}&w_2\n\\end{bmatrix},\n\\tag{13.29}\n\\]\ncalculate the values of $l_{52}$, $l_{53}$, $l_{54}$, and $\\hat{w}_2$ by equating the last row of $L_1U_1$ with the last row of the matrix in (13.29)."}
